When the earth will be shaken with a mighty shaking,Footnote-1
and the earth will throw up all her burdens,Footnote-2
and man will cry out: “What is the matter with her?”Footnote-3
On that Day it will relate all her news,Footnote-4
for your Lord will have commanded her (to do so).
On that Day people will go forth in varying statesFootnote-5 so that they be shown their deeds.Footnote-6
So, whoever does an atom's weight of good shall see it;
and whoever does an atom's weight of evil shall see it.Footnote-7
